channel.title: Mohan Reddy | Developer Blog
channel.description: Technical articles and guides on React, TypeScript, Java, Android, Firebase, and SEO by Mohan Reddy.

item.title: Advanced State Management in React 18: Beyond Redux
item.description: Explore modern state management paradigms in React 18, including Zustand, Recoil, and Signals, comparing performance and developer experience.

item.title: Building Real-Time Web Apps with Cloud Firestore and React
item.description: Learn how to design scalable real-time architectures using Firebase Firestore and React, including caching, security rules, and performance tips.

item.title: Mastering TypeScript: Type-Safe Development for Full Stack Engineers
item.description: Dive into advanced TypeScript concepts including conditional types, mapped types, utility types, and structural typing for full-stack engineering.

item.title: Oracle Java SE 17: Deep Dive into Modern Language Features
item.description: A detailed guide to the most impactful features introduced in LTS Java 17, including pattern matching, records, sealed classes, and garbage collectors.

item.title: Designing UniVault: Building Secure Offline-First Android Applications
item.description: Behind the scenes of UniVault, a secure Android application built with Kotlin, Room DB, AES-256 encryption, and offline-first capabilities.

item.title: How to Design a Developer Portfolio That Wins Recruiter Attention
item.description: Best practices for designing portfolios that recruiters love, focusing on real-world projects, proof of work, performance, and UI details.

item.title: Technical SEO for React Single Page Applications: The Ultimate Guide
item.description: A complete guide to resolving indexation, dynamic meta tags, structured data, and performance issues in React Single Page Applications.
